channel.title: Right-Wing Extremism and Alt-Right - Tag - bounds.dev
channel.description: Right-Wing Extremism and Alt-Right - Tag - bounds.dev

item.title: Europe's Diplomatic Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Europe’s Diplomatic Tango

In Europe, a rift they must fix,
As Ukraine and Trump play their tricks.
Zelensky’s attire,
The right-wing’s on fire,
While Musk uses memes just for kicks.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Europe Races to Repair a Split Between the U.S. and Ukraine
  • ‘Why Don’t You Wear a Suit?’: A Right-Wing News Outlet With Coveted Access Questions Zelensky
  • How Elon Musk Uses Internet Slang to Marshal His Army of Online Fans

item.title: Vance's Munich Mishap
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Vance’s Munich Mishap

In Munich, a speech caused a stir,
As Vance’s support seemed to blur.
For far-right he cheered,
While Scholz appeared,
And tensions in Europe did whir.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • German Chancellor Rebukes Vance for Supporting Party That Downplays Nazis
  • Vance Shocks Europe With Support for Far Right, in Message Familiar to U.S.

item.title: Campaigns and Chaos
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Campaigns and Chaos

Kamala speaks of economic cheer,
While Trump’s ads are full of fear.
Right-wing groups chat,
On Telegram they sat,
As polls keep results unclear.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Harris’s and Trump’s Closing Messages, as Seen Through Their Ads
  • Right-Wing Groups Are Organizing on Telegram Ahead of Election Day
  • Some Late Shifts, but Polls Remain Closest They’ve Ever Been
